name: claude-code-hooks
description: claude code hooks - adding voice on each hook
readme_summary: This repository enhances the Claude Code AI by adding auditory feedback for various events within the coding workflow. It integrates "hooks" that trigger sounds, providing real-time vocal cues for actions like session start, tool usage, agent responses, and task completion.
key_features: Adds auditory feedback to Claude Code sessions.
Provides sound cues for session start, tool use, agent response, and more.
Includes installation guides for Mac, Linux, and Windows.
Changelog for hook additions and Claude Code version updates.
primary_use_case: To provide developers with an enhanced, more intuitive, and interactive coding experience with Claude Code by adding audible feedback for key events.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot character, representing Claude Code, sitting at a sleek, modern desk. The robot is wearing headphones and has a speech bubble emanating from its mouth, filled with musical notes and subtle sound wave patterns. Around the desk, various icons representing coding actions (like a gear for tool use, a document for agent response, a checkmark for task completion) are subtly glowing and emitting faint, colorful sound waves towards the robot. The background is a softly blurred, futuristic coding environment. The overall mood is helpful and engaging, emphasizing intuitive feedback. The style should be a clean, 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant yet soft color palette.

name: SysMocap
description: A real-time motion capture system for 3D virtual character animating.
readme_summary: SysMocap is a cross-platform real-time motion capture system designed for animating 3D virtual characters. It supports various input formats and offers features like full-body tracking, facial expression capture, and integration with live-streaming software.
key_features: GUI with Material Design 3 and Dark Mode
WebXR API support for Mocap Forwarding
Model viewer with bones & dressing controller
Auto Skeleton Detection for VRM and Mixamo FBX
Manual mapping for any skeleton structure
primary_use_case: Real-time motion capture and animation for 3D virtual characters, particularly for VTubers and live streaming.
cover_image_prompt: A digital puppeteer, represented as a stylized, glowing avatar, is effortlessly controlling a complex 3D character on a screen. The puppeteer's hands, made of light particles, are subtly gesturing, and these gestures are directly mirrored by the 3D character's movements. The input is visualized as a stream of abstract motion data flowing from the puppeteer's gestures into the screen, while the output is the vividly animated 3D character. The background is a clean, modern studio space with subtle UI elements showing bone structures and animation timelines. The overall mood is creative and magical, with a focus on the seamless connection between the digital puppeteer and the virtual actor. Style: 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, glowing accents.

name: SadTalker
description: [CVPR 2023] SadTalker：Learning Realistic 3D Motion Coefficients for Stylized Audio-Driven Single Image Talking Face Animation
readme_summary: SadTalker is a Python-based project that animates a single portrait image to create a talking head video, driven by an audio input. It learns realistic 3D motion coefficients for stylized, audio-driven facial animation, enabling users to generate talking head videos from static images and speech.
key_features: Single image to talking head animation
primary_use_case: Generating realistic talking head videos from a single portrait image and an audio file.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, antique music box sits open, revealing a static portrait painting inside. As a gentle melody emanates from the music box, the painted portrait's lips begin to move in sync with the music, and its eyes subtly shift, bringing the artwork to life as a talking head. Subtle sound waves visualize the audio input flowing from the music box towards the portrait. The background is a softly lit, cozy artist's studio. The overall style is a whimsical, 3D isometric illustration with a warm color palette, emphasizing the transformation of a static image into a dynamic, animated character through sound.

name: AI-Scientist-v2
description: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
readme_summary: The AI Scientist-v2 is an advanced agentic system designed for fully autonomous scientific discovery. It can independently generate hypotheses, conduct experiments, analyze data, and author scientific manuscripts, generalizing across ML domains without human-authored templates. This version utilizes a progressive agentic tree search managed by an experiment manager agent.
primary_use_case: Automated scientific discovery and research paper generation
cover_image_prompt: A wise, robotic owl perched on a stack of glowing scientific journals, holding a quill pen that is actively writing a complex research paper. Around the owl, holographic projections display intricate data visualizations, chemical structures, and lines of code, representing the autonomous generation of hypotheses, experiments, and analysis. The background is a softly lit, futuristic library. Subtle digital particles flow from the quill, illuminating the scene. The repository name 'AI Scientist v2' is subtly etched into the base of the journal stack. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing golds.

name: chandra
description: OCR model that handles complex tables, forms, handwriting with full layout.
readme_summary: Chandra OCR 2 is a state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR) model designed to convert images and PDFs into structured formats like HTML, Markdown, and JSON. It excels at preserving layout information and handles complex documents including tables, forms, handwriting, and mathematical content across over 90 languages.
key_features: Converts documents to markdown, html, or json with detailed layout information
Strong performance with tables, math, and complex layouts
Extracts images and diagrams, and adds captions and structured data
Two inference modes: local (HuggingFace) and remote (vLLM server)
primary_use_case: Extracting structured data and layout information from complex documents, including images and PDFs, using advanced OCR capabilities.
cover_image_prompt: A master cartographer meticulously redrawing an ancient, complex map that has been scanned into a blurry image. The cartographer uses glowing digital tools to trace intricate lines, reconstruct faded text, and organize scattered symbols into a clear, structured legend and grid system. The input is a faded, torn parchment, while the output is a crisp, digital map displayed on a nearby screen, complete with data points and labels. Subtle code snippets and data flow visualizations appear in the background. The scene is set in a high-tech studio with ambient blue lighting. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and detail.

name: insanely-fast-whisper
readme_summary: Insanely Fast Whisper is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that leverages advanced optimizations like Flash Attention 2 and fp16 precision to achieve extremely rapid audio transcription using OpenAI's Whisper models on-device. It is designed for users who need to transcribe large amounts of audio quickly, particularly on NVIDIA GPUs and Macs.
key_features: On-device audio transcription with OpenAI's Whisper
Optimized for speed using Transformers, Optimum, and flash-attn
Supports Whisper Large v3 and distil-whisper models
Achieves significantly faster transcription times compared to standard implementations
Provides a user-friendly CLI for easy inference
Benchmarks available for various optimization techniques and hardware
primary_use_case: To provide extremely fast, on-device audio transcription via a command-line interface, significantly reducing the time required to process audio files.
cover_image_prompt: A hyper-realistic, stylized illustration of a sleek, futuristic audio waveform being rapidly unspooled like a high-speed film reel. At the end of the unspooling reel, the audio waveform seamlessly transforms into crisp, clear text projected onto a screen. A subtle, glowing digital conduit connects the waveform input to the text output, symbolizing the 'insanely fast' transformation. Small, abstract representations of code or data streams flow alongside the conduit. The overall mood is one of speed and efficiency, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant, electric blue and white color palette. The repository name 'Insanely Fast Whisper' is subtly integrated into the screen's interface.
